name: WhatsApp-Native Invoicing for Colombian SMBs
problem_statement: Colombian SMBs (restaurants, retailers, service businesses) still issue paper invoices or use WhatsApp screenshots. DIAN electronic invoice mandate is rolling out -- they need a dead-simple $10/mo solution.
target_customer: Colombian SMB owners, 1-5 employees, restaurants and retail, not tech-savvy
trigger_signal: DIAN mandate enforcement Q3 2026 -- news coverage spike in El Tiempo
why_now: DIAN electronic invoice mandate rollout creates mandatory adoption pressure for all SMBs in 2026
evidence_summary: DIAN mandate news, Siigo/Alegra reviews on G2, WhatsApp groups with SMB owners discussing panic about compliance
kill_reason: Sample placeholder record — unscored, no evidence base. Re-ingest with real signals if opportunity resurfaces.
